flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 51% at University of Puerto Rico-Medical Sciences vs the 2003–2007 baseline (224 vs 455).

flags.label: Earnings trend · post-entry horizons
flags.summary: Earnings 10 years post-entry at University of Puerto Rico-Medical Sciences are 20% above 6-year earnings ($38.2k → $46.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Puerto Rico-Medical Sciences fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at University of Puerto Rico-Medical Sciences are 50% above the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($46.0k vs $30.6k).
